items.name: TokenTracker
items.description: Track token usage across 17 AI agent CLIs — Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Antigravity, Kiro, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Every Code, Hermes, GitHub Copilot, Kimi Code, CodeBuddy, Grok Build, oh-my-pi, Kilo CLI, Kilo Code. Local-first, zero-config, with a beautiful dashboard, native macOS menu bar app, and 4 desktop widgets.

items.name: Equibles
items.description: An open-source, self-hosted mini Bloomberg Terminal for AI agents — SEC filings, institutional holdings, insider trading, congressional trades, and short data from a single self-hosted stack.

items.name: vexjoy-agent
items.description: VexJoy AI Agent with Intelligent Routing

items.name: skill-based-architecture
items.description: A meta-skill that produces skills. Point it at any codebase and it distills the project's rules, workflows, and hard-won lessons into a dedicated skills/<name>/ directory — a project skill that becomes the single source of truth every AI agent (Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Windsurf, Gemini) consults before every task.

items.name: jiuwenswarm
items.description: JiuwenSwarm is an intelligent AI Agent built on openJiuwen. It extends the powerful capabilities of large language models directly to your fingertips through various communication apps you use daily.
